mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary policy that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 3.5% signals a tight labor market, which boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in 60% or more of instances where UNRATE is below 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in housing starts (HOUST) and retail sales (RSAFS) indicates strong consumer demand, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 20-day returns when both HOUST and RSAFS show growth.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) during an expansionary phase signals increased corporate output, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns during periods of rising INDPRO in expansionary regimes.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading above 300 signals elevated inflation, prompting central bank tightening that compresses equity valuations and leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 60% or more of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 300.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in housing starts (HOUST) indicates strong demand for residential construction, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 20-day returns when HOUST shows growth.

mechanism_narrative: Strong job growth (PAYEMS) combined with low unemployment (UNRATE) signals a robust labor market, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 5-day returns when both PAYEMS and UNRATE show favorable trends.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth (GDPC1) during late-cycle expansion signals sustained economic momentum, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns during periods of strong GDP growth in late-cycle regimes.
